name: Hannah Gadsby
blurb: Interrogated the form itself in Nanette.
bio: Hannah Gadsby detonated the form with Nanette, refusing to let trauma stay a punchline and turning the hour into an argument about comedy itself. Douglas followed, folding art history and autism into the act.

timeline.ev: Wins an Emmy and a Peabody

accolades: Emmy Award and Peabody for Nanette
Forced a global debate about the form
